content.title: GitHub Integration

userStory.iWant: my GitHub PRs to automatically link to TaskFlow tasks
userStory.soThat: task status updates when code is merged without manual bookkeeping

acceptanceCriteria.given: I create a PR with 'Fixes TF-123' in the description
I push a branch with task ID in the name
acceptanceCriteria.when: the push is received via webhook
acceptanceCriteria.then: the task shows a link to the branch and PR

implementationDetails: GitHub App with webhook subscriptions for pull_request and push events
Regex parser for task ID extraction from PR descriptions and branch names
Bidirectional status sync: PR merged -> task Done, task blocked -> PR label added
content.notes: GitHub App already registered in the TaskFlow org — just needs webhook endpoint deployment.
